title: Designing a 2D Animation
scenario: Create a visually stunning 2D animation of a rocket ship launching into space. The prompt should include a detailed description of the animation sequence, timing, and visual effects.
constraints: Must be rendered in a 500x500 pixel canvas
Must include a minimum of 5 distinct visual effects

evaluationCriteria.description: Checks if the generated GIF adheres to all constraints.
Evaluates the smoothness, coherence, and visual appeal of the animation.
Verifies the appropriateness and effectiveness of timing and pacing.
Checks the creativity and realism of visual effects.
